case_title: PEDRO SIERRA VS. KIDDER ENTERPRISES INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIERRA, PEDRO AS TO DEFENDANT KIDDER ENTERPRISES INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIERRA, PEDRO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIDDER ENTERPRISES INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $3,566.43 PRINCIPAL, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,771.43, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
